svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/143.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="ai-eval-tool-poc" name="AI Eval Tool - POC Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1042" dy="657" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#1a1a2e;" value="AI Evaluation Tool - POC Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="500" x="400" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dev_actor" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Developer / QA" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="40" x="80" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eval_platform_boundary" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1a1a2e;arcSize=6;spacingTop=5;" value="Eval Platform (Deployed Web App)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="620" x="200" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="frontend_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;arcSize=8;spacingTop=2;" value="Frontend (React / Next.js)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="560" x="230" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="csv_upload" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="CSV Upload
(input | expected_output |
category | difficulty | metadata)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="250" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="endpoint_config" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="Target Endpoint Config<br><br>• Base URL<br>• Auth headers&nbsp;<br>• Request schema mapping" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="170" x="430" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dashboard" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="Results Dashboard

• Pass / Fail rates
• Transcript viewer
• Grader breakdowns
• Run history" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="155" x="620" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;arcSize=8;spacingTop=2;" value="Eval Engine (Backend API — FastAPI / Node)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="560" x="230" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="test_runner" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="Test Runner /
Orchestrator

Iterates CSV rows,
sends to target,
collects responses" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="95" width="150" x="250" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="grader_pipeline" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="Grader Pipeline

1. Deterministic
 (exact, regex, contains)
2. Semantic similarity
3. LLM-as-Judge
4. Custom plug-in" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="95" width="170" x="425" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="results_store" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="Results Store

• Run metadata
• Per-task scores
• Full transcripts
• Grader verdicts" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="95" width="155" x="620" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="database" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=12;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Database
(PostgreSQL / SQLite)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="130" x="640" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="target_boundary" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1a1a2e;arcSize=6;spacingTop=5;" value="Target System (Dev Environment)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="280" x="110" y="696" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="chatbot_dev" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Chatbot / AI Agent
(Dev Instance)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="130" y="780" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tunnel_note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=8;fontStyle=0;" value="Reachable via:
• Staging URL
• ngrok tunnel (localhost)
• Cloud dev instance
• Docker endpoint" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="130" y="860" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="llm_judge_api" parent="1" style="shape=hexagon;perimeter=hexagonPerimeter2;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fixedSize=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;size=15;" value="External LLM API
(Claude / GPT)
— LLM-as-Judge —" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="530" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_dev_fe" edge="1" parent="1" source="dev_actor" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=11;" target="frontend_box"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_dev_fe_label" connectable="0" parent="arrow_dev_fe" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=10;fontColor=#333333;" value="Uploads CSV,
configures endpoint,
views results" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="-15" y="-10" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_fe_be" edge="1" parent="1" source="frontend_box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" target="backend_box"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_fe_be_label" connectable="0" parent="arrow_fe_be" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=10;fontColor=#333333;" value="Triggers eval run" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="55" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_runner_target" edge="1" parent="1" source="grader_pipeline" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;exitX=0.284;exitY=0.911;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" target="target_boundary" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="473" y="510" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="510" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="770" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="-525" y="830" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_runner_target_label" connectable="0" parent="arrow_runner_target" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;" value="HTTP POST
(test input)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.15" y="-1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="-15" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_target_grader" edge="1" parent="1" source="target_boundary" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#b85450;dashed=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.1;entryY=0.937;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="grader_pipeline" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="250" y="530" /> <mxPoint x="410" y="530" /> <mxPoint x="410" y="482" /> <mxPoint x="421" y="482" /> <mxPoint x="421" y="479" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="-255" y="858.5" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_target_grader_label" connectable="0" parent="arrow_target_grader" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;" value="Response
(actual output)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.3" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="-15" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_grader_llm" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;exitX=0.435;exitY=1.095;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" target="llm_judge_api" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="510" y="500" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="518.9499999999998" y="500.02499999999986" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_grader_llm_label" connectable="0" parent="arrow_grader_llm" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=10;fontColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=2;" value="LLM-as-Judge
grading call
(optional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="15" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_grader_results" edge="1" parent="1" source="grader_pipeline" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" target="results_store" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_grader_results_label" connectable="0" parent="arrow_grader_results" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=10;fontColor=#333333;" value="Verdicts +
transcripts" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="-15" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_results_db" edge="1" parent="1" source="results_store" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" target="database" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_results_db_label" connectable="0" parent="arrow_results_db" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=10;fontColor=#333333;" value="Persist" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="15" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_db_dashboard" edge="1" parent="1" source="database" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#d6b656;dashed=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitDxe=0;exitDye=-12;" target="dashboard" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="705" y="520" /> <mxPoint x="810" y="520" /> <mxPoint x="810" y="310" /> <mxPoint x="698" y="310" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow_note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0f0f0;strokeColor=#999999;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;spacingRight=10;fontColor=#333333;" value="Data Flow:
1. Developer uploads CSV test cases + configures target endpoint
2. Eval Engine iterates rows → sends each input to target via HTTP
3. Target returns actual response
4. Grader pipeline scores (deterministic → semantic → LLM judge)
5. Results persisted → Dashboard renders pass/fail, transcripts, metrics" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="380" x="840" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="design_note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fce4ec;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;spacingRight=10;fontColor=#333333;dashed=1;" value="Key POC Decisions:
• Target system is endpoint-agnostic — any reachable URL works
• For localhost dev: use ngrok / cloudflared tunnel
• Grader pipeline is modular — add/remove grader types per run
• CSV schema: input | expected_output | category | difficulty | tags
• Each eval run is isolated (no shared state between test cases)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="280" x="940" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Data Flow:
1. Developer uploads CSV test cases + configures target endpoint
2. Eval Engine iterates rows → sends each input to target via HTTP
3. Target returns actual response
4. Grader pipeline scores (deterministic → semantic → LLM judge)
5. Results persisted → Dashboard renders pass/fail, transcripts, metrics

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(252, 228, 236), rgb(52, 31, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 585px; margin-left: 895px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Key POC Decisions:
• Target system is endpoint-agnostic — any reachable URL works
• For localhost dev: use ngrok / cloudflared tunnel
• Grader pipeline is modular — add/remove grader types per run
• CSV schema: input | expected_output | category | difficulty | tags
• Each eval run is isolated (no shared state between test cases)
